scripts.deploy: npm run build --prefix frontend && cp frontend/dist/index.html backend/public/spa.html && cp frontend/dist/favicon.svg backend/public/favicon.svg && rm -rf backend/public/assets && cp -r frontend/dist/assets backend/public/assets && chmod o+r backend/public/spa.html backend/public/favicon.svg && chmod o+rx backend/public/assets && chmod o+r backend/public/assets/*
